title: toona hexandra var. grandifoliola
intro: Toona hexandra var. grandifoliola, also known as the large-leaved toona, is a deciduous tree species belonging to the mahogany family (Meliaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Toona hexandra var. grandifoliola include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting respiratory health. In traditional herbal medicine, the leaves and bark of the plant are used in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
